title: Investigate realworld diff divergences
description:
Investigate and fix remaining realworld differential test divergences. Started with 12 failures, now 11 (networking.c fixed as MISSING normalization false positive).

Root cause identified: Go main loop advances one version at a time and terminates before MISSING token versions can accept. See ql0.5 for the fix.

Completed:
- doReduce alignment with C (isFragile, fragile/parse_state, single-pass) — committed
- betterVersionExists fixes (4 mismatches) — committed
- MISSING node normalization in difftest.go — committed, fixed networking.c
- diff-test → test-diff rename — committed

In progress:
- ql0.5: Main loop restructure (root cause, P1)

Remaining:
- ql0.3: Perl divergences (likely fixed by ql0.5)
- ql0.4: Go generics ambiguity (separate issue)
